description.ko: 백색광이 기하학적 커스틱스의 선명한 무지개로 부서지는 순수 에너지와 빛 굴절의 탐구입니다.
description.en: An exploration of pure energy and light refraction, where white light shatters into a vivid rainbow of geometric caustics.

prompt: A high-precision optical render of PRISM-2, titled 'The Chromatic Symphony.' A multifaceted geometric glass sculpture refracts a sharp beam of white light into a brilliant fanned-out spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet. Soft #FFFF00 yellow caustic patterns dance across a dark matte background with intense chromatic aberration. Macro focus on internal reflections and sharp edges. 8k resolution, minimalist aesthetic, pure light dispersion.
